div1.entryFree: Thrifty, frugal, economical, intent on profit: like a t. goddess, she determines herself the glory of a creditor, both thanks and use, Meas. I, 1, 39. a proverb never stale in t. mind, Merch. II, 5, 55. the t. hire I saved under your father, As II, 3, 39.* they are t. honest men, H6B IV, 2, 196. a t. shoeing-horn in a chain, Troil. V, 1, 61.
